'''Raskta Fenni''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] who lived before the [[Jedi Civil War]]. She was considered one of the greatest duelists of her time, and many [[Echani foil]]s were crafted in her honor. Unfortunately, they were mass-produced and lacked quality, often breaking in combat. Many millennia later, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Raskta Lsu]] was named after her.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Rule of Two (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
